  C3E530:                         PADDEDASCII "\xEC\x25\xB6\x25", OPTIONLENGTH ;メーター
  C3E530:                     .ENDIF
  C3E530:                     PADDEDEBTEXT "REPLAY", OPTIONLENGTH
  C3E530:                     PADDEDEBTEXT "TEST1", OPTIONLENGTH
  C3E530:                     PADDEDEBTEXT "TEST2", OPTIONLENGTH
  C3E530:                     PADDEDEBTEXT "", OPTIONLENGTH
  C3E530:                 .ENDIF
